calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Cross-Defendant Kenneth Lebon, Individually And Dba 7c'S Trucking.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
Daniel Monberg, Vice President at Bank of the West, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Kenneth O. Lebon, individually and dba 7-C's Trucking.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendants Rainwater Trucking Company Inc. and Kelly Rainwater was filed today, April 19, 2010.
Doe defendants wre dismissed today, April 19, 2010.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 10, 2009.

Exhibit--1--Equipment Lease, dated 10/06/05------------------------------------------EVID/ID.
Exhibit--2--Commercial Lease Agreement, dated 10/06/05-------------------------------EVID/ID.
Exhibit--3--Assignment & Assumpton, dated 4/1/08-------------------------------------EVID/ID.
Exhibit--4--Guaranty, dated 3/20/08--------------------------------------------------EVID/ID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of the West, and against defendant Kenneth O. Lebon, individually and dba 7-C's Trucking as follows:

Principal - $42,891.94.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,415.90.
Attorney Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $535.00.

Total - $53,342.84.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2010 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant in Propria Persona Kenneth O. Lebon and dba, 7-C's Trucking for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered defendant Kenneth O. Lebon sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Set For Trial On Apr-19-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-02-10 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 503

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2010 Continued To Mar-18-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant in Propria Persona Kenneth O. Lebon and dba, 7-C's Trucking for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Defendant Kenneth O. Lebon is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/18/2010 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Ntc And Motion For Sanctions And For Order Striking Answer And Entering Default
Off Calendar Dec-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Plaintiff Bank of the West's Motion for sanctions and for order striking answer and entering default against defendant for failure to comply with discovery order denied without prejudice to a motion for evidentiary and/or issue sanctions. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And That Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Douglas Alan Holloway, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Bank of the West

After hearing, Plaintiff Bank of the West's Motion for order compelling answers to interrogatories and that requests for admission be deemed admitted; and for sanctions: Granted.
1. Defendant to serve verified responses to interrogatories within 20 days of notice of entry of order.
2. Request for admission deemed admitted.
3. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $490.00 payable within 20 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2009 Set For Trial On Mar-08-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Feb-24-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 318

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Continued To Sep-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
